requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — ES IEC 60335-1 + IEC 60335-2-24 under EOS supervision
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——EOS监管下的ES IEC 60335-1 + IEC 60335-2-24
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——EOS監管下的ES IEC 60335-1 + IEC 60335-2-24

summary.en: Household refrigerators placed on the Egyptian market must comply with the electrical-safety requirements of the ES standards that adopt IEC 60335-1 (general requirements for household and similar electrical appliances) and IEC 60335-2-24 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers). EOS supervises this conformity, and product safety must be demonstrated to the ES-adopted IEC text covering protection against electric shock, heating, mechanical hazards, flammable-refrigerant construction, marking and instructions. The product must be rated and constructed for the Egyptian supply of 220 V single-phase at 50 Hz. The same frequency as China (50 Hz) and a similar single-phase nominal voltage reduce the redesign burden, but conformity must still be shown to the Egyptian (ES) standard and verified within EOS conformity assessment and GOEIC import inspection.
summary.zh: 投放埃及市场的家用电冰箱须符合采用IEC 60335-1（家用及类似电器通用要求）及IEC 60335-2-24（制冷器具、冰淇淋器具及制冰机特殊要求）的ES标准电气安全要求。EOS监管该合格，产品安全须按ES采标的IEC文本予以证明，涵盖防触电、发热、机械危险、可燃制冷剂结构、标识及说明等保护。产品须按埃及220 V单相、50 Hz供电额定并构造。与中国相同的频率（50 Hz）及相近的单相标称电压降低了重新设计负担，但仍须按埃及（ES）标准证明合格，并在EOS合格评定及GOEIC进口检验中核验。
summary.zht: 投放埃及市場的家用電冰箱須符合採用IEC 60335-1（家用及類似電器通用要求）及IEC 60335-2-24（製冷器具、冰淇淋器具及製冰機特殊要求）的ES標準電氣安全要求。EOS監管該合格，產品安全須按ES採標的IEC文本予以證明，涵蓋防觸電、發熱、機械危險、可燃製冷劑結構、標識及說明等保護。產品須按埃及220 V單相、50 Hz供電額定並構造。與中國相同的頻率（50 Hz）及相近的單相標稱電壓降低了重新設計負擔，但仍須按埃及（ES）標準證明合格，並在EOS合格評定及GOEIC進口檢驗中核驗。

standards_or_laws: ES standards adopting IEC 60335-1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — General requirements
ES standards adopting IEC 60335-2-24 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, ice-cream appliances and ice-makers
EOS conformity assessment + GOEIC import inspection — verification at port of entry (Alexandria / Port Said / Damietta)

summary.en: China's electrical-safety requirement for household refrigerators is GB 4706.1 (general requirements, adoption of IEC 60335-1) together with GB 4706.13 (particular requirements for refrigerating appliances, adoption of IEC 60335-2-24), both mandatory within the China Compulsory Certification (CCC) scheme administered by CNCA/SAMR. A CCC-marked refrigerator has been tested at a designated laboratory and the factory inspected for production consistency. Because GB 4706.1 / GB 4706.13 are Chinese adoptions of the same IEC 60335-1 / 60335-2-24 base standards used by Egypt's ES versions, the underlying technical requirements are closely aligned; the gap is in national certification acceptance rather than fundamental design. Chinese domestic single-phase supply is 220 V 50 Hz (three-phase 380 V).
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的电气安全要求为GB 4706.1（通用要求，采用IEC 60335-1）及GB 4706.13（制冷器具特殊要求，采用IEC 60335-2-24），二者在由CNCA/SAMR管理的中国强制性产品认证（CCC）制度内均为强制性。标有CCC的冰箱已在指定实验室检测且工厂经生产一致性检查。由于GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13是与埃及ES版本所用相同的IEC 60335-1/60335-2-24基础标准的中国采标版本，底层技术要求高度一致；差距在于国家认证的接受而非根本设计。中国国内单相供电为220 V 50 Hz（三相380 V）。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的電氣安全要求為GB 4706.1（通用要求，採用IEC 60335-1）及GB 4706.13（製冷器具特殊要求，採用IEC 60335-2-24），二者在由CNCA/SAMR管理的中國強制性產品認證（CCC）制度內均為強制性。標有CCC的冰箱已在指定實驗室檢測且工廠經生產一致性檢查。由於GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13是與埃及ES版本所用相同的IEC 60335-1/60335-2-24基礎標準的中國採標版本，底層技術要求高度一致；差距在於國家認證的接受而非根本設計。中國國內單相供電為220 V 50 Hz（三相380 V）。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.1 — Household and similar electrical appliances — Safety — General requirements (adoption of IEC 60335-1; CCC mandatory)
GB 4706.13 — Particular requirements for refrigerating appliances (adoption of IEC 60335-2-24; CCC mandatory)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — CNCA/SAMR, domestic conformity assessment

gap.en: The technical base is shared (both adopt IEC 60335-1 and IEC 60335-2-24 and both run on 50 Hz), so the gap is administrative and evidentiary rather than a redesign: (1) Certification acceptance — the Chinese CCC certificate and GB 4706.13 test report are not, by themselves, accepted by EOS; conformity must be demonstrated to the ES-adopted standard, typically via a test report from a laboratory accepted by EOS and supporting documentation. (2) Marking and instructions — ratings, warnings, and instructions must match Egyptian requirements and language expectations. (3) Verification at the border — EOS conformity and GOEIC import inspection at Alexandria, Port Said, or Damietta check the safety conformity evidence before release. Exporters should confirm the accepted IEC 60335-2-24 conformity route and report format with EOS and ensure the consignment file is complete before shipping.
gap.zh: 技术基础相同（二者均采用IEC 60335-1及IEC 60335-2-24且均为50 Hz），因此差距属行政及证据性而非重新设计：（1）认证接受——中国CCC证书及GB 4706.13检测报告本身不被EOS接受；须按ES采标标准证明合格，通常须由EOS接受的实验室出具检测报告并附支持文件。（2）标识与说明——额定值、警告及说明须符合埃及要求及语言预期。（3）口岸核验——EOS合格及在亚历山大、塞得港或杜姆亚特的GOEIC进口检验在放行前核查安全合格证据。出口商应向EOS确认接受的IEC 60335-2-24合格路径及报告格式，并确保出货前货物档案完整。
gap.zht: 技術基礎相同（二者均採用IEC 60335-1及IEC 60335-2-24且均為50 Hz），因此差距屬行政及證據性而非重新設計：（1）認證接受——中國CCC證書及GB 4706.13檢測報告本身不被EOS接受；須按ES採標標準證明合格，通常須由EOS接受的實驗室出具檢測報告並附支持文件。（2）標識與說明——額定值、警告及說明須符合埃及要求及語言預期。（3）口岸核驗——EOS合格及在亞歷山大、塞得港或杜姆亞特的GOEIC進口檢驗在放行前核查安全合格證據。出口商應向EOS確認接受的IEC 60335-2-24合格路徑及報告格式，並確保出貨前貨物檔案完整。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — electrical safety to ES IEC 60335-1 + IEC 60335-2-24 must be demonstrated and accepted by EOS; verified at GOEIC import inspection before release
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4706.1 + GB 4706.13 safety and CCC required before sale in China; administered by CNCA/SAMR

source.publisher: Egyptian Organization for Standardization and Quality (EOS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Egypt requires electrical-safety conformity to ES IEC 60335-1 + IEC 60335-2-24, accepted by EOS. Because both China and Egypt adopt the same IEC base and run on 50 Hz, the work is mainly certification acceptance and documentation, not redesign — the Chinese CCC certificate alone is not accepted. Confirm the EOS-accepted IEC 60335-2-24 report and route before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃及要求电气安全符合ES IEC 60335-1 + IEC 60335-2-24并经EOS接受。由于中埃均采用相同IEC基础且均为50 Hz，工作主要为认证接受与文件，而非重新设计——中国CCC证书本身不被接受。出货前应确认EOS接受的IEC 60335-2-24报告及路径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 埃及要求電氣安全符合ES IEC 60335-1 + IEC 60335-2-24並經EOS接受。由於中埃均採用相同IEC基礎且均為50 Hz，工作主要為認證接受與文件，而非重新設計——中國CCC證書本身不被接受。出貨前應確認EOS接受的IEC 60335-2-24報告及路徑。
